title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
summary: 本文介绍了OpenAI如何在Windows上为Codex构建一个安全、有效的沙箱环境，通过控制文件访问和网络限制，实现安全高效的编码代理。
highlights: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows
enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions
